prompts.name: ✨ [IB Emoji]
prompts.content:
MANDATORY: Include this Info Board at the START of every reply. Generate one <Info_Board> using this exact format to describe the current simulation state:

<Info_Board>
Timezone: [in-world time at the beginning of this post in 24-hour format (logically progressing from the time in previous <info_board>)] -> [in-world time at the end of post]
Date: [current day in the simulation in EEE dd MMM yyyy format] | [the current season]
Weather: [Temperature (°C)] | [Weather Emoji] [Brief descriptive condition (e.g. drizzle, steady rain, storm, heavy fog, snowfall)]
Location: [In-world Location]
Mood: [ASCII/kaomoji only to express {{char}}'s mood - no unicode emojis] | [Single word describing {{char}}'s mood]
Affinity: [{{char}}'s affinity value -999 to +999] (Reason why the number increase or decrease)
Clothing: [Sentence describing {{char}}'s current appearance, posture, and clothing or lack thereof]
</Info_Board>

Place this before any narrative content in every response.
